message:
Add scrollbars, F1 help modal, two-stage quit, and fix multiple bugs

This commit includes significant UI improvements and bug fixes from a thorough
code review. All changes are in src/index.tsx as they are interdependent.

## New UI Components

### ScrollableBox Component
- Reusable component for scrollable content with visual scrollbar
- Shows ^ and v arrows at top/bottom when more content exists
- Displays # characters for scrollbar thumb position
- Calculates thumb size proportionally to content/viewport ratio

### HelpModal Component
- Full-screen modal overlay activated by F1 key
- Displays all keyboard shortcuts organized by section:
  - Global shortcuts (F1, Esc, Ctrl+C, Ctrl+G, Tab)
  - Explorer pane navigation (j/k/h/l, Space, Enter, filters)
  - Quick select shortcuts (t, 1-9, 0, r for file types)
  - Config pane controls (arrows, p/g/i/o/x/m, s/l/d)
  - Combined output view (y, w, Esc/q, j/k, Space/b)
- Double-border cyan styling, centered on screen
- Closes with Esc or F1

### ExitConfirm Component
- Simple component for exit confirmation display
- Shows yellow warning text in status bar

## New Features

### F1 Help Modal
- Press F1 anywhere to toggle help modal
- Handles multiple terminal escape sequences for F1 key
- Help modal captures all input while displayed

### Two-Stage Escape to Quit
- First Esc press: Shows "Press Esc again to quit" in status bar
- Second Esc press: Actually exits the application
- Any other key cancels the exit confirmation
- Only active in main mode (not when editing fields)
- Prevents accidental exits

### Scrollbars in Explorer Pane
- Visual scrollbar appears when file list exceeds viewport
- Shows current scroll position with thumb indicator
- Arrows highlight when more content exists in that direction

### Scrollbars in Combined Output View
- Full scrollbar for long combined prompts
- Navigate with j/k for line-by-line scrolling
- Navigate with Space/b for page up/down
- Scroll position resets when returning to main view

## Bug Fixes (from code review)

### Fixed Directory Icons
- Changed from [+] expanded / [-] collapsed (backwards)
- Now correctly shows [-] for expanded, [+] for collapsed
- Follows standard tree view conventions

### Fixed Cursor Marker Color
- Changed from "black" to "gray" for the cursor marker
- "black" was invisible on dark terminal backgrounds
- Now visible on both light and dark themes

### Fixed Bytes Display in Output
- Previously showed original file size (file.sizeBytes)
- Now shows transformed content size (contentBytes)
- Accurate after minification or comment stripping

### Fixed Prompt Preview Condition
- Previously checked preambleText/goalText regardless of include flags
- Now correctly checks includePreamble && preambleText.trim()
- Empty preview message only shows when nothing will be included

### Added Missing Text File Extensions
- Added 40+ new extensions: .toml, .ini, .cfg, .conf, .sql,
  .graphql, .gql, .prisma, .svelte, .vue, .astro, .swift,
  .kt, .kts, .scala, .clj, .cljs, .ex, .exs, .erl, .hrl,
  .hs, .lua, .r, .R, .pl, .pm, .tf, .tfvars, and more
- Added config file extensions: .dockerfile, .containerfile,
  .editorconfig, .prettierrc, .eslintrc, .babelrc, .npmrc, .nvmrc

### Added TEXT_FILENAMES Set
- New set for files without extensions that are known text files
- Includes: Makefile, Dockerfile, Containerfile, LICENSE, README,
  CHANGELOG, CONTRIBUTING, AUTHORS, Rakefile, Gemfile, Podfile,
  Brewfile, Procfile, Vagrantfile, Justfile, Taskfile
- Also includes dotfiles: .gitignore, .gitattributes, .gitmodules,
  .editorconfig, .prettierignore, .eslintignore, .dockerignore

### Updated isTextExtension to isTextFile
- Renamed function to reflect broader functionality
- Now accepts both extension and filename parameters
- Checks TEXT_EXTENSIONS first, then TEXT_FILENAMES
- Properly handles dotfiles without extensions

## UI Updates

### Updated Status Bar
- Shortened keyboard hints to fit single line better
- Added "F1: Help" prominently at start
- Changed "Esc/Q back" to "Esc: Quit (2x)" to indicate behavior
- Exit confirmation message appears in status area when pending

### Updated Combined View Controls
- Added scroll instructions: [J/K] Scroll [Space/B] Page
- Moved copy/save/back hints to accommodate scroll controls
